Introducing GPT-5

June 1, 2026

We are releasing GPT-5, our most advanced model. GPT-5 (gpt-5) is available via the OpenAI API.

What GPT-5 Does Well

GPT-5 demonstrates strong performance on coding, reasoning, multimodal, and instruction-following tasks.

Safety and System Card

Read the GPT-5 System Card for safety details.
